output: Completed batch 12. Added regression coverage for resize pending-op lifecycle, per-upload external-drop pending-op tracking, timeline event-bus subscription cleanup, and the editor data/ops provider split. Also ran a temporary one-file Vitest repro for the cancelled-resize pending-op bug, confirmed it passed, and deleted the repro file. Final verification passed with `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/`: 26 test files and 94 tests passed. Checkpoint written to `reigh-app/.megaplan/plans/take-the-video-editor-20260406-0351/execution_batch_12.json`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Added durable regression coverage for the finalized timeline fixes: `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` covers resize pending-op increment/decrement on normal end and cancel, `useExternalDrop.test.tsx` now verifies per-file pending-op tracking across async upload settlement, `useTimelineEventBus.test.ts` covers subscription/emission/unsubscribe cleanup, and `VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx` now consumes the split editor data/ops contexts directly. As a final verification step, ran a temporary one-file Vitest repro for the cancelled-resize pending-op bug and removed it after confirmation. Full verification passed with `npx vitest run --config config/testing/vitest.config.ts src/tools/video-editor/`: 26 test files / 94 tests passed. Manual browser smoke steps were not run from this headless terminal environment.
